name: SmartPixel
description: Generate customisable QR with one click.
author: Dikshant Goel

name: BannerAnimate
description: Convert editable PDFs to Animated Web banners within minutes.
author: Surrmay Shrivastav

name: NoCodeX
description: This is a high-precision visual editor and live HTML studio designed to build, inspect, and refine professional eDA content with real-time DOM synchronization.
author: Suman Biswas

name: WebPify
description: A utility designed to converting images between JPG, PNG, and WebP formats with ease.
author: Arnab Adhikary

name: SyntaxFlow
description: Generates optimized queries for SFMC journeys, enabling precise audience targeting and seamless campaign execution.
author: Sushruth Iyenger

name: Orbis
description: A no-code survey builder that lets you create professional, responsive surveys through intuitive drag-and-drop. Configure content visually and export flawless, device-ready HTML - no coding required.
author: Sushruth Iyenger

name: Veeva Extension
description: Download all slides and shared files in one go - and binder management at your fingertips.
author: Ashutosh, Suman Biswas

name: SiteSnap Studio
description: Download all slides and shared files in one go - and binder management at your fingertips.
author: Suman Biswas, Sharun

name: MailRender
description: Create ready to deliver PDF from your email HTML with precision and consistency.
author: Vepada Satish, Arnab Adhikary

name: LinkBridge
description: A unified tool to convert URLs into CSAT links, deeplinks, or standard web links.
author: Nagesh

name: iPDF Studio
description: Convert static PDFs into interactive presentations with clickable regions and visual storytelling.
author: Arnab Adhikary

name: PrecisionQA
description: Standardize and streamline the QA process with structured validation, consistent checks, and improved accuracy across workflows.
author: Kishan Srivastava

name: eDAOptimizer
description: Clean up your code by removing unused images and optimizing existing ones for better performance.
author: A Ganesan

name: SmarteDA
description: Automatically convert standard eDAs into Smart eDAs by mapping intelligent flows directly from PDFs.
author: Arnab Adhikary

name: ThumbZip eDA
description: Automatically generate thumbnail images for each eDA slide and package them into a ready-to-deploy ZIP.
author: Arnab Adhikary

name: VideoPack CLM
description: Convert videos into deployment-ready CLM packages with auto-generated thumbnails and poster images for seamless delivery.
author: Ankit Kumar

name: Media Studio
description: A tool designed to convert images single and bulk, extracting images, texts and other components from pdfs and creating pdfs by uploading bulk images.
author: Arnab Adhikary

name: EMpower PDF
description: A tool built as a pdf reader to emulate all the activities one does in Acrobat
author: Arnab Adhikary
